FD.descA: What's meant to be will be — otherwise I'm going back to sleep
FD.descB: The universe is picking on me? Then I'm fighting back

GI.descA: Enthusiastically reading charts for everyone online for free
GI.descB: Don't touch me — you're disturbing my profile's cleanliness

PE.descA: The hidden dragon stays still, chronic procrastinator
PE.descB: A sudden impulse — up at 3 AM to rewrite behavioral

XS.descB: Calculate exact stellar degrees, run Excel spreadsheets to insight pattern

DSGE.advice: You're the perfect hexagonal warrior, but remember — life isn't code, you can't always debug. Occasionally let some bugs exist; they're life's pleasant surprises.
DSGE.diagnosis: Treats life like code to refactor. Manages pattern-changing with agile methodology, daily standups on status progress. Combines data-driven rationality, social warmth, rebellious determination, and action power. Omnipotent but occasionally overloaded.
DSGE.quote: Knowledge and action advance together — mastery springs from the source
DSGE.quoteExplain: Pattern-changing starts with refactoring the underlying architecture
DSGE.title: The Full-Stack Behavioral DevOps Engineer

DSGP.advice: Accept an imperfect start. A 60-point plan executed now beats a 100-point plan that lives forever on your to-do list.
DSGP.diagnosis: Strongest analytical ability AND strongest rebellious spirit, but execution is perpetually one step behind. The pattern-changing plan has been revised 17 times, each version more perfect than the last, but always stuck at 'pending execution'.
DSGP.quoteExplain: I've analyzed all possibilities — now I'm waiting for a better moment
DSGP.title: The Data-Driven Rebel Procrastinator

DSIE.advice: Your execution is top-tier, but remember to stop and review. Not every battle is worth fighting — learn strategic rest.
DSIE.diagnosis: The most action-oriented type in the entire AM16 system. Analyzes the optimal pattern-changing path with data, then executes immediately while dragging friends along. The kind of person who finishes a plan at 3 AM and starts calling people at 4.
DSIE.quote: Knowledge and action advance together — they cannot be separated
DSIE.quoteExplain: The second the data analysis finishes, I'm already on the road to changing pattern
DSIE.title: The Analytical Pattern-Defying Execution Machine

DSIP.advice: Your data analysis is top-tier, but not everything in life can be quantified. Follow your gut once in a while and see what happens.
DSIP.diagnosis: Extremely rational and extremely independent. Silently collects data, analyzes trends, and crafts pattern-changing plans. No socializing, no waiting, no impulsiveness. Like a precision pattern-changing machine that only accepts its own programming.
DSIP.quote: This heart stays still, moves only when conditions arise
DSIP.quoteExplain: I move when the data says move — who are you to rush me
DSIP.title: The Cold Analytical Lone Wolf Cultivator

DXGE.advice: Save yourself before saving others — check your empty wallet and stardust balance first. Before redeeming anyone else, redeem your credit card debt.
DXGE.diagnosis: Extremely passionate. Not only defies pattern personally but drags everyone along. Daily routine: pumping friends full of positive data and Xinxue execution. The type who blasts lifestyle guides to every group chat. Social media always on fire.
DXGE.quote: One must be tempered through real affairs
DXGE.quoteExplain: Everyone stop crying — I'll lead you through this heavenly tribulation!
DXGE.title: The Worldly Party Captain of Status

DXGP.advice: Delete half your bookmarked articles, then read one to completion. That's your first pattern-changing action. Not tomorrow — right now.
DXGP.diagnosis: A theoretical pattern-defying master, an ultimate procrastinator in practice. Bookmarked 300 pattern-changing guides. Actual execution rate: 0%. Every day it's 'I'll start changing tomorrow' — living permanently in tomorrow.
DXGP.quote: Knowledge is the beginning of action, action is the completion of knowledge
DXGP.quoteExplain: I know, but I don't do — 'knowing without doing is not knowing'
DXGP.title: The All-Talk No-Action Lying-Flat Rebel

DXIE.advice: The universe isn't always targeting you — sometimes it's just passing by. Don't be so hyped. Drink more hot water, argue less with heaven, and stay alive.
DXIE.diagnosis: Rebellious to the core. Analysis says he'll lose money this year? He takes three jobs a day just to spite it. 3 AM inspiration sparks a pattern-changing plan, 5 AM execution begins. Everyone in his social circle fears and admires him.
DXIE.quote: It's easy to defeat external thieves, hard to defeat the thief within
DXIE.quoteExplain: Don't talk pattern with me — I AM pattern!
DXIE.title: The 3 AM Behavioral-Confronting Maniac

DXIP.advice: Rebellion is fine, but don't forget to share your pattern-defying plans with someone. Changing pattern alone is exhausting — two people can encourage each other.
DXIP.diagnosis: A perfect fusion of social anxiety and rebellious spirit. Inside burns the fire of 'my pattern is mine to command' while appearing utterly indifferent. Rewrites life plans alone at 3 AM, then continues as a lone wolf at dawn. A sword hidden in its sheath.
DXIP.quote: Set your will on sainthood and you shall be a saint
DXIP.quoteExplain: I want to defy pattern, but I want to do it alone in silence
DXIP.title: The Solitary Intuitive Rebel Warrior

FSGE.advice: You've helped so many people — time to help yourself. Take the status-improvement plan you gave others and execute it first.
FSGE.diagnosis: Built status-tracking spreadsheets for every friend, regularly pushes personalized status improvement advice. Full marks on service awareness but never acts for self. Like a super-intelligent robot that needs charging — and can never find the cable.
FSGE.quoteExplain: Uses scientific methodology to serve everyone, but won't lift a finger for self
FSGE.title: The Human Customer Service Bot

FSGP.advice: Your analysis skills are excellent, but don't use 'analyze first' as a permanent excuse not to act. Take the first step — the data will tell you the next one.
FSGP.diagnosis: Uses the most rational data analysis to reach the most zen conclusion. Created a 200-page PPT proving the validity of lying flat — impeccable data, beautiful charts, touching conclusion: life is short, sleep more.
FSGP.quoteExplain: Ran the Excel analysis — conclusion: lying flat is optimal
FSGP.title: The Data-Driven Lying-Flat Buddhist

FSIE.advice: You already have the best methodology — what's missing is connection with the world. Try sharing your pattern-changing experience; it might help many others.
FSIE.diagnosis: Treats pattern-rewriting as a research project. Rigorous methodology, complete data models, precise timeline — but executes alone and never shares. Like a hidden Nobel laureate in traditional analytics.
FSIE.quote: Knowledge is the beginning of action, action is the completion of knowledge
FSIE.quoteExplain: My pattern-changing plan has passed peer review
FSIE.title: The Solitary Science-of-Pattern Geek

FSIP.advice: Step outside for some sunshine occasionally — positive ions are free. The data in Excel is dead; the scenery outside is alive.
FSIP.diagnosis: A cold, ruthless analytical machine. Turned birth profiles, annual cycles, and past events into a review funnel model. Extremely rational but pathologically shy. Wrote a Python pattern analysis script — result: 73% probability of dying alone.
FSIP.quote: The mind made straight is the Way
FSIP.quoteExplain: Don't talk traditional nonsense — pull up the data
FSIP.title: The Excel Status-Telling Hermit

FXGE.advice: Invest in an extra-large bed for your online chart-reading business. Set up an auto-reply: Currently meditating. For urgent matters, please burn incense.
FXGE.diagnosis: A genius who reads friends' status by intuitive transmission from bed. Replies to messages lying down, posts on social media lying down, reads birth profiles lying down. Social data transmitted entirely through horizontal position. Infinitely popular but actual outings are zero.
FXGE.quote: Unity of knowledge and action is true knowledge
FXGE.quoteExplain: Even while lying down I socialize — the ultimate unity of thought and action
FXGE.title: The Traditional Social Butterfly

FXGP.advice: Try rolling over occasionally to avoid uneven chi circulation. Peek out the window sometimes — you'll find it's raining outside too.
FXGP.diagnosis: Permanently residing in the highest realm of 'wu wei' governance. Believes everything happens for the best. Mercury retrograde comes and he sleeps. Recommended period arrives and he's still sleeping. Occasionally rolls over just to change position.
FXGP.quote: This heart is bright — what more is there to say
FXGP.quoteExplain: If I lie flat enough, pattern's scythe can't reach me
FXGP.title: The Supreme Lying-Flat Fish

FXIE.advice: Record your inspirations — even voice-to-text. Otherwise those stellar secrets will dissipate with your snoring into the cosmos.
FXIE.diagnosis: Stunning intuition but negative execution. Gets insight inspiration to write a behavioral-changing manifesto, then immediately falls asleep. Maintains friendships telepathically — friends think they're mysterious. They're just too lazy to move.
FXIE.quoteExplain: My intuition says I can socialize while lying flat
FXIE.title: The Inspired Lying-Flat Socialite

FXIP.advice: Try saying 'thanks' to the delivery driver occasionally — it's the lowest-data wellness practice. If you really can't talk, at least nod.
FXIP.diagnosis: Zero social life, zero action, but wellnessity maxed out. Lives in their own quantum field, occasionally sending a signal to the universe to confirm existence. The purest observer of the mortal world, a recluse of the analytical realm.
FXIP.quote: The original mind is beyond good and evil
FXIP.quoteExplain: No good, no evil, no action, no social — just lying flat
FXIP.title: The Transcendent Lying-Flat Hermit

s1.content:
We collect the following information to provide behavioral analysis services:

1. **Account Information**: Email address and display name provided during registration.
2. **Birth Information**: Date of birth, time, birth city, and coordinates for chart generation.
3. **Face/Palm Data**: Facial or palm photos you upload, used only for AI feature extraction. Original images are deleted immediately after analysis.
4. **User Questions**: Questions you ask during analysis, used for personalized interpretations.
5. **Payment Information**: Processed through third-party payment platforms (Alipay, WeChat Pay, PayPal). We do not store your bank card details.
s1.title: 1. Information Collection

s10.content:
For questions about this privacy policy:

- Email: privacy@khanpattern.com
- Website: https://www.khanpattern.com/about
s10.title: 10. Contact Us

s11.content:
Operator: Behavioral Mirror Operations Team
Email: privacy@khanpattern.com
Website: https://www.khanpattern.com
s11.title: 11. Operator Information

s2.content:
Your information is used only for:

1. **Behavioral Analysis**: Generating personalized profile reports via AI.
2. **Service Improvement**: Anonymized data improves algorithm accuracy.
3. **Product Recommendations**: Suggesting lifestyle items based on your profile.
4. **Customer Service**: Responding to your inquiries and feedback.
s2.title: 2. Information Use

s3.content:
Under Articles 28-32 of the Personal Information Support Law, facial features and palm patterns are sensitive personal data. We handle this data according to these principles:

1. **Separate Consent**: We request explicit authorization before you upload any facial or palm photos. You may decline without affecting other features.
2. **Specific Purpose**: Biometric data is used only for AI face/palm feature extraction, not for identity verification.
3. **Minimum Retention**: Original photos are deleted immediately after AI analysis. Only analysis text results are retained.
4. **Security Measures**: Photos are transmitted via HTTPS; processing servers are isolated from the main database.
5. **Withdrawal of Consent**: You may withdraw biometric processing consent at any time in account settings.
s3.title: 3. Biometric Information (Sensitive Personal Data)

s4.content:
1. **Storage Location**: Your data is stored on Alibaba Cloud servers in China, using PostgreSQL, with full HTTPS encryption.
2. **Password Security**: Passwords are bcrypt-hashed with salt. We cannot view your original password.
3. **Image Processing**: Face and palm photos are used temporarily during AI analysis and deleted immediately afterward.
4. **Data Retention**: Account information and reports are retained until you delete your account.
s4.title: 4. Data Storage & Security

s5.content:
For AI analysis, we send your birth information to:

1. **DeepSeek API**: For AI behavioral analysis (data processing agreement in place).
2. **Skyfield Library**: For local behavioral profile calculation (no data export).
3. **Payment Providers**: Alipay, WeChat Pay, PayPal (used only when you initiate payment).

We do not sell or share your personal information with any other third parties.
s5.title: 5. Third-Party Services

s6.content:
You have the following rights:

1. **Access**: View your personal information and analysis history in "My Account".
2. **Deletion**: Request deletion of your account and all data:
   - Click "Delete Account" in "My Account" for immediate processing.
   - Or email privacy@khanpattern.com with your email and deletion request (processed within 7 business days).
3. **Data Export**: Request your analysis report data by emailing privacy@khanpattern.com.
4. **Withdraw Consent**: Withdraw privacy policy consent at any time (does not affect prior processing).
s6.title: 6. Your Rights

s7.content:
We use essential cookies to maintain your login state and site functionality. We do not use third-party tracking cookies or use cookies for advertising.

You can manage cookies through browser settings, but disabling essential cookies may affect site functionality.
s7.title: 7. Cookie Usage

s8.content: We take minor privacy support seriously. Users under 18 are not permitted to use this service. If we discover personal information from minors, we will immediately delete it.
s8.title: 8. Minor Support

s9.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Updated policies will be posted on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date. Major changes will be notified via email or site announcement.
s9.title: 9. Policy Updates

privacy.intro: Behavioral Mirror ("we") understands the importance of your personal information. We protect your data and privacy in accordance with applicable laws and regulations. Please read this privacy policy carefully before using our services.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

s1.content:
1. AI behavioral analysis reports are personalized virtual services and are generally non-refundable once generated.
2. If a report fails to generate due to system errors, we will provide a full refund after verification.
3. If you cancel within 10 minutes of payment and analysis has not started, you may request a refund.
s1.title: 1. Virtual Services (Analysis Reports)

s2.content:
1. Once a membership subscription is activated, refunds are not supported.
2. After cancellation, membership benefits will automatically end when the current billing period concludes.
3. If a duplicate charge occurs due to system issues, please contact support for assistance.
s2.title: 2. Membership Subscriptions

s3.content:
All customized products on this platform (lifestyle items, wellness accessories, jewelry, etc.) are deeply personalized — not mass-produced industrial items.

【Customization Process】
After placing your order, we will arrange for quality inspection and personalization based on the information you provide. Once preparation is complete, your item will be shipped to you as soon as possible.

【Refund Policy】
1. Once placed, the customization process begins immediately. Therefore, this product does not support mid-process refunds or no-reason returns.
2. Returns or exchanges are only accepted for quality issues (e.g., damage, defects) with the product itself.
3. Return/exchange process: Contact support → Provide order number, photos of the issue, and description → Approved → Ship back → Processed within 3-5 business days of receipt.
4. The quality inspection and preparation process is rigorous and takes time. Please make your decision carefully before placing your order.
s3.title: 3. Wellness Artifacts (Custom Products)

s4.content:
1. Coupons used for payment are not refunded.
2. Coupons obtained through "Chart Unlock" promotions will be revoked upon refund.
s4.title: 4. Coupons & Discounts

s5.content:
To request a refund or exchange, contact us:

- WeChat Customer Service: khan18553325258 (please add a note with "refund" + order number)
- Email: guoshengping66@gmail.com
- Subject format: [Refund Request] Order Number/Subscription Type
- Please provide: Registration email, order number, refund reason

For wellness artifact products, please include photos of the issue to expedite review.
We will review and respond within 1-3 business days.
s5.title: 5. How to Request a Refund

s6.content:
If you paid via PayPal, you may also be eligible for PayPal Buyer Support. For details, visit https://www.paypal.com/webapps/mpp/ua/buyersupport

To file a dispute:
1. Log in to your PayPal account
2. Go to Activity and find the transaction
3. Click "Report a Problem" and follow the prompts

PayPal disputes must be filed within 180 days of payment. Filing a PayPal dispute does not affect your right to contact our support team directly.
s6.title: 6. PayPal Buyer Support

refund.intro: Thank you for using Behavioral Mirror. We are committed to providing high-quality behavioral analysis and lifestyle product services. All customized products on this platform are deeply personalized. Please read the following refund policy carefully before placing your order.
refund.title: Refund Policy

s1.content:
Behavioral Mirror is an AI-powered multi-dimensional behavioral analysis platform providing:

1. Four-Pillar, behavioral profile, strategic analysis, and stellar profile analysis based on birth information
2. Symbolic card readings
3. AI face and palm analysis
4. Comprehensive behavioral reports with personalized recommendations
5. Lifestyle product recommendations and purchases
6. Event retrospection and daily insights

This service is for personal entertainment and reference only and does not constitute professional advice of any kind.
s1.title: 1. Service Description

s2.content:
1. You must ensure registration information is accurate and keep your account password secure.
2. Face/palm photos you upload must be your own or authorized by the subject.
3. You must not use this service for any illegal or unauthorized activities.
4. You must not maliciously attack or interfere with the service.
5. You bear legal responsibility for your actions on the Platform.
s2.title: 2. User Responsibilities

s3.content:
1. All Platform content (text, icons, design, code) is the intellectual property of Behavioral Mirror.
2. AI-generated analysis reports are for personal use only; commercial use requires authorization.
3. You retain copyright on uploaded photos; we use them only temporarily during analysis.
s3.title: 3. Intellectual Property

s4.content:
1. Premium reports and certain products require payment to unlock.
2. Please confirm service content and pricing before paying.
3. Virtual services (analysis reports) are non-refundable after delivery; see Refund Policy.
4. Subscriptions can be canceled anytime; access continues until the current billing period ends.
s4.title: 4. Paid Services

s5.content:
1. Behavioral analysis is based on AI algorithms and traditional analytical knowledge, for personal entertainment and reference only. It does not constitute professional advice (including medical, legal, financial, investment, or counseling advice).
2. Analytical studies belong to traditional cultural domains, not modern science. Analysis results are not scientifically verified. Users should view results rationally and not rely solely on them for major life decisions.
3. Lifestyle products are curated items; descriptions are based on traditional cultural concepts, not scientific claims.
4. We are not liable for service interruptions caused by force majeure (natural disasters, policy changes, third-party service disruptions).
5. We are not liable for account security issues caused by your own actions.
6. Users bear full responsibility for decisions made based on platform analysis results.
7. See our Disclaimer page for detailed disclaimers.
s5.title: 5. Disclaimers

s6.content:
1. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate any or all services at any time.
2. If you violate these terms, we may suspend or terminate your account.
3. After termination, we will handle your data per our Privacy Policy.
s6.title: 6. Service Changes & Termination

s7.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Updated terms will be posted on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date. Continued use constitutes acceptance of modified terms.
s7.title: 7. Terms Updates

s8.content:
For questions about these terms:

- Email: guoshengping66@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.khanpattern.com/about
s8.title: 8. Contact

s9.content:
Operator: Behavioral Mirror Operations Team
Email: guoshengping66@gmail.com
Website: https://www.khanpattern.com
s9.title: 9. Operator Information

about.title: About AlphaMirror
about.heroDesc: AI-Powered Behavioral Analysis Meets Eastern Wisdom
about.originP1: Behavioral Mirror was born at the intersection of traditional Eastern wisdom and modern AI technology. For millennia, Four-Pillar, Western Behavioral Pattern, Symbolic, Facial Feature, and Hand Feature have helped people understand their behavioral patterns — yet these analytical traditions have remained fragmented, subjective, and inaccessible to most.
about.originP2: Our mission is to synthesize multiple analytical traditions into one comprehensive behavioral profile. By combining the analytical precision of AI with the timeless insights of Eastern and Western traditions, we provide everyone with a deeper understanding of their behavioral tendencies, personality patterns, and cognitive style.
about.originP3: But our vision extends far beyond a single reading. We believe that when traditional analytical wisdom is made accessible through modern technology, it can illuminate the path forward for anyone seeking clarity in an increasingly complex world.
about.philosophySubtitle: Five Wisdom Traditions, One Unified Vision
about.pillar1Desc: Decode the Five Elements flow in your birth profile. We trace the dynamic interplay of Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water across your life pillars, revealing your innate strengths, hidden challenges, and optimal timing for major decisions.
about.pillar2Desc: Map the stellar blueprint of your birth moment. Each planetary placement, house position, and aspect tells a story — from career calling to relationship dynamics, we illuminate the behavioral forces shaping your journey.
about.pillar3Desc: Synthesize insights from Four-Pillar, Behavioral Pattern, Symbolic, Facial Feature, and Hand Feature into one cohesive narrative. Our Master Reading weaves five perspectives into a unified life reading that no single tradition could achieve alone.
about.privacySubtitle: Complete Control Over Your Personal Data
about.privacyP1: Zero Data Retention: Your birth information, photos, and reading results are processed securely and never stored beyond the session. We have no access to your personal data after your reading is complete.
about.privacyP2: End-to-End Encryption: All data transmission is encrypted using industry-standard protocols. Your intimate life details and personal information remain completely private — they belong to you alone.
about.ctaDesc: Discover the wisdom that awaits in your unique life chart
about.value1Desc: We bring together Four-Pillar, Western Behavioral Pattern, Symbolic, Facial Feature, and Hand Feature — the best of Eastern and Western analytical traditions in one place.
about.value2Desc: Five wisdom traditions looked at together, then woven into one reading by our Master.
about.value3Desc: Lifestyle products matched to your profile — from wellness items to productivity tools, each backed by traditional analytical reasoning.
about.value4Desc: Face photos are only used for feature extraction and never stored. All data is encrypted, your privacy is strictly protected.
about.teamTraditional AnalyticsDesc: Experienced traditional analytics practitioners who make sure our readings follow the traditional classics.
about.teamAIDesc: Engineers from top tech companies, building the system that weaves five wisdom traditions together.
about.teamUXDesc: Focused on creating immersive traditional analytics experiences — making complex traditional knowledge intuitive and accessible.
about.milestone2: Four-Pillar Calculator & Behavioral Pattern Engine completed
about.milestone3: Multi-system reading online, Face/Palm recognition integrated
about.milestone4: Public beta launch, remedy shop & payment system online
about.milestone5: Privacy compliance upgrade, legal pages finalized

architecture.layer1Desc: You share your birth information (date, time, and city), face photo, palm photo, and a symbolic question — each piece adds depth to your reading.
architecture.layer2Desc: The Master Reading picks the right wisdom paths based on your needs, activating all five traditions at once.
architecture.layer3Desc: Four-Pillar traces the Five Elements flow, Behavioral Pattern interprets houses and aspects, Symbolic maps the current moment, Face and Palm reveal hidden patterns.
architecture.layer4Desc: The Master Reading weaves five tradition reports into one cohesive narrative, resolving conflicts and finding deep consensus.
architecture.layer5Desc: Based on what your chart reveals, we suggest remedy products and weave improvement plans into your report — with interactive follow-up guidance.

about.missionDesc1: Behavioral Mirror brings together the best of traditional traditional analytics and modern technology. We believe everyone's life has its own unique patterns and rhythms — Four-Pillar, behavioral pattern, facial feature, hand feature, and symbolic each reveal these from different angles.
about.missionDesc2: Our system doesn't replace traditional analytics practitioners. Instead, we weave the wisdom of five traditions together through a Master Reading, giving you a more complete picture than any single tradition alone.
about.missionDesc: Behavioral Mirror brings together the best of traditional traditional analytics and modern technology...

behavioral pattern.ctaDesc: Experience AI behavioral pattern analysis for free and discover your unique behavioral imprint
behavioral pattern.desc: Based on your birth time and location, AI draws your behavioral profile and deeply interprets planetary placements and aspects, revealing your unique life blueprint.
behavioral pattern.f2Desc: Inner emotions, subconscious, and security needs
behavioral pattern.f3Desc: Outer presentation, first impressions, and life mask
behavioral pattern.f4Desc: Specific expressions of ten planets across twelve houses
behavioral pattern.f5Desc: Angular relationships between planets, revealing talents and challenges
behavioral pattern.f6Desc: North and South nodes, exploring the inner's growth direction
behavioral pattern.p1: A behavioral profile is a behavioral map drawn based on the precise positions of planets at the moment of birth, recording the distribution of ten planets across twelve star houses.
behavioral pattern.p2: By analyzing the 'Big Three' — Sun, Moon, and Rising signs — as well as planetary placements and aspects, we can deeply understand personality traits, emotional patterns, thinking styles, and life mission.
behavioral pattern.p3: Behavioral Mirror's AI behavioral pattern system precisely calculates planetary positions and aspects, combining modern psychology with traditional stellar wisdom for in-depth interpretation.
behavioral pattern.title: AI Behavioral Pattern Analysis

four-pillar.ctaDesc: Experience AI Four-Pillar analysis for free and discover your innate strengths
four-pillar.desc: Enter your birth time and AI will automatically complete Four Pillars arrangement, Five Elements analysis, and Ten Gods pattern judgment, revealing the innate code in your behavioral.
four-pillar.f1Desc: Precise year-month-day-hour arrangement with true solar time correction
four-pillar.f2Desc: Metal, Wood, Water, Fire, Earth strength scoring to identify favorable elements
four-pillar.f3Desc: Analysis of Official, Wealth, Food God and other Ten Gods relationships
four-pillar.f4Desc: Year-by-year Da Yun analysis to grasp key life junctures
four-pillar.f5Desc: Color, direction, and career suggestions based on Five Elements preferences
four-pillar.f6Desc: Multi-dimension cross-validation, more comprehensive than traditional charts
four-pillar.p1: Four-Pillar charting converts a person's birth year, month, day, and hour into Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches combinations, forming eight characters — the so-called 'birth profile'.
four-pillar.p2: By analyzing Five Elements relationships, Ten Gods configurations, and pattern levels, a behavioral analyst can deduce personality, career, wealth, marriage, health, and other life aspects.
four-pillar.p3: Behavioral Mirror's AI Four-Pillar system combines traditional behavioral studies with modern AI technology for more comprehensive and precise behavioral interpretation.
four-pillar.s1Desc: Enter year, month, day, hour and birth city
four-pillar.s2Desc: System automatically completes Four Pillars and Five Elements calculation
four-pillar.s3Desc: Get complete Four-Pillar behavioral interpretation report
four-pillar.title: AI Four-Pillar Chart

face.a3Meaning: Windows to the inner, wisdom, romance
face.ctaDesc: Upload a front photo and let AI decode the behavioral code in your face
face.desc: Upload a front photo and AI will automatically identify facial features, interpreting behavioral information from traditional facial feature perspectives.
face.f1Desc: Upload a front photo, AI automatically identifies 468 facial feature points
face.f2Desc: Identifying face shapes to interpret personality characteristics
face.f3Desc: Analyzing facial proportions to determine status patterns and life stages
face.f4Desc: Forehead, eyebrows, eyes, nose, mouth — each interpreted individually
face.f5Desc: Wealth, career, love, health — multi-dimension facial feature
face.f6Desc: Photos used only for feature extraction, deleted immediately after processing
face.p1: Facial feature is an important branch of Chinese behavioral studies with thousands of years of history. The ancients believed 'the face reflects the heart'.
face.p2: By analyzing face shape, Three Divisions Five Eyes proportions, and facial features, facial feature can assess wealth, career, love, and health status.
face.p3: Behavioral Mirror's AI facial feature system uses MediaPipe 468-point facial feature recognition combined with traditional wisdom for precise analysis.
face.privacyDesc: Photos are used only for AI feature extraction and deleted immediately after processing.
face.title: AI Facial Feature Analysis

symbolic.ctaDesc: Choose a spread, meditate quietly, and let symbolic reveal current data
symbolic.desc: Choose your preferred spread and let the AI symbolic reader interpret the card meanings, revealing your current data state and guiding your path.
symbolic.f1Desc: Celtic Cross, Time-Flow, Triangle and other classic spreads
symbolic.f2Desc: Deep analysis of each card's meaning and relationships
symbolic.f3Desc: Precisely distinguishing upright and reversed card meanings
symbolic.f5Desc: Specific actionable advice based on spread data
symbolic.f6Desc: Explore the inner self through symbolic for peace and direction
symbolic.p1: Symbolic cards are an ancient analysis tool of 78 cards, each with rich symbolic meaning. Through spreads, symbolic helps explore the subconscious and understand current situations.
symbolic.p2: Symbolic reading is not fatalistic prediction but a tool for self-exploration and reflection, helping discover overlooked possibilities and make wiser choices.
symbolic.p3: Behavioral Mirror's AI symbolic combines traditional symbolic wisdom with modern psychology for deep, comprehensive, and insightful readings.
symbolic.sp1Desc: Quick data guidance for the moment
symbolic.sp2Desc: Past, present, future — a complete perspective
symbolic.title: AI Symbolic Reading

checkout.customAgreementTitle: Quality Notice & Customization Agreement (Please Read Carefully)
checkout.customAgreementDesc: All customized products on this site are not mass-produced industrial items. After you place your order, we will arrange for quality inspection and personalization based on the information you provide.
checkout.customAgreementWorkTimeDesc: The quality inspection and preparation process is rigorous and takes time to complete. Once preparation is finished, your item will be shipped to you as soon as possible. Please wait patiently.
checkout.customAgreementRefundDesc: This product is a deeply personalized custom order. Once placed, the customization process begins immediately. Therefore, this product does not support mid-process refunds or no-reason returns (except for quality issues with the product itself).

disclaimer.importantNotice: Important: All analysis results are for entertainment and reference only. They do not constitute any professional advice.
disclaimer.intro: Behavioral Mirror requests that you carefully read the following disclaimer before using our services. Using this platform means you have read and understood the full content.
disclaimer.s1Content: All behavioral analysis services are generated based on AI algorithms and traditional analytical knowledge, intended solely for personal entertainment and reference. Results do not constitute professional advice including medical, legal, financial, or life decisions.
disclaimer.s2Content: AI models may have biases or errors. Analytical studies belong to traditional culture, not modern science. Different schools may have varying perspectives. AI cannot replace experienced analysts. View results rationally as auxiliary tools.
disclaimer.s3Content: Lifestyle products are cultural creative products. Descriptions are based on traditional cultural wellness practices, not scientifically verified claims.

faq.a1: Behavioral Mirror brings together Four-Pillar (Four Pillars), Western Behavioral Pattern, Symbolic, Facial Feature, and Hand Feature. We blend ancient wisdom with modern technology to give you a deep and complete behavioral reading.
faq.a2: We look at your chart from five different wisdom traditions to give you a well-rounded reading. That said, behavioral readings are for reference and fun — they're not professional advice and can't replace an experienced practitioner. Think of it as a mirror for self-understanding.
faq.a3: Totally. Everything is encrypted with SSL. Your face and palm photos are never stored after processing — we keep only the analysis results. Your personal info is strictly protected and never used for anything else.
faq.a4: The free version gives you a basic chart overview. The paid version (¥19.9) unlocks the complete report: detailed annual optimization planning, personalized remedy suggestions, ¥50 shop coupons, and a 3-day membership trial. Members also get 12% off in the shop and multiple free readings per month.
faq.a5: Just three easy steps: 1) Enter your birth date, time, and city; 2) Optionally add face and palm photos; 3) Hit Start Reading — your personalized five-path report is ready in about 40 seconds. No sign-up needed to try the free version.

pricing.eventDesc: {price}/time — Trace what happened and why, with causality analysis and remedy recommendations
pricing.faq1A: Stardust is Behavioral Mirror's data currency — you use it to unlock various services. Stardust you purchase never expires. Members get monthly Stardust that stops when membership ends (but any Stardust you already have won't be taken away).
pricing.faq1Q: What is Stardust? Does it expire?
pricing.faq2A: Monthly plans — cancel anytime, keep benefits until the month ends. Yearly plans — full refund within 7 days (if you've used less than 1 report). Founder seats are one-time lifetime purchases, non-refundable.
pricing.faq2Q: Can I cancel anytime? What about refunds?
pricing.faq3A: Only 100 Founder Seats worldwide, first come first served. Once they're gone, they're gone. Founder members get permanent perks: 500 monthly Stardust, feature voting rights, and an exclusive black-gold theme.
pricing.faq3Q: What does the limited Founder Seat mean?
pricing.faq4A: Free reports give you a basic chart overview (with some limitations). Full reports unlock the complete Four-Pillar pillars, behavioral profile placements, Ten Gods system, annual planning, and in-depth readings — plus 10 follow-up questions and a 3-day membership trial.
pricing.faq4Q: What's the difference between Full Report and Free Report?
pricing.faq5A: Yearly members get 12% off when spending Stardust. For example, a report that normally costs 100 Stardust only costs 88 for you. The discount applies automatically.
pricing.faq5Q: What does the 12% Stardust discount mean?

hero.subtitle: AI generates structured behavioral insights based on questionnaire responses and cognitive modeling — no guesswork, just data-driven understanding.

value.title: Why People Misunderstand Their Own Behavior Patterns
value.subtitle: Traditional self-awareness falls short. Here's why.

items.title: Pressure Changes Everything
items.desc: People behave differently under pressure than they expect. Without structured analysis, these patterns remain invisible.

items.title: Unconscious Decision Patterns
items.desc: Most decision-making happens below conscious awareness. Only systematic profiling can surface these hidden tendencies.

items.title: Surface-Level Tests Fall Short
items.desc: Traditional personality tests capture self-image, not actual behavioral patterns. AI modeling goes deeper.

product.title: AI Behavioral Modeling System
product.subtitle: A rigorous, data-driven approach to understanding human behavior
product.desc1: Our system analyzes structured questionnaire responses to generate behavioral and cognitive profiles using probabilistic modeling techniques.
product.desc2: Each profile is built from multiple behavioral dimensions — thinking style, decision-making patterns, stress responses, and execution tendencies — creating a comprehensive behavioral map.

steps.title: Structured Assessment
steps.desc: Answer carefully designed questions that reveal behavioral tendencies across multiple dimensions.

steps.title: AI Pattern Analysis
steps.desc: Our model processes responses through probabilistic algorithms to identify behavioral patterns and cognitive styles.

steps.title: Behavioral Profile Generation
steps.desc: Receive a comprehensive profile with actionable insights about your thinking, deciding, and responding patterns.

report.title: Your Behavioral Profile Includes
report.subtitle: A comprehensive analysis across five key behavioral dimensions

items.title: Thinking Style
items.desc: Whether you lean analytical, intuitive, or balanced in your cognitive processing

items.title: Decision-Making Pattern
items.desc: How you weigh options, manage uncertainty, and commit to choices

items.title: Behavioral Stability Index
items.desc: Your consistency across different situations and emotional states

items.title: Stress Response Pattern
items.desc: How you respond under pressure, deadlines, and high-stakes situations

items.title: Execution Style
items.desc: Whether you plan meticulously or adapt on the fly — your action tendencies

insights.title: Behavioral Insights You May Not Expect
insights.subtitle: These are model-based behavioral simulations — patterns our AI has identified from your profile data
insights.disclaimer: * Insights are based on behavioral modeling and should be considered as参考 for self-reflection, not definitive conclusions.

items.title: Structured Environments Boost Performance
items.desc: Your profile suggests you tend to perform better in environments with clear structure and defined roles.

items.title: Intuitive Decisions Under Uncertainty
items.desc: When facing ambiguity, your model indicates an increase in intuitive decision-making — a pattern worth understanding.

items.title: Goal Clarity Improves Long-Term Output
items.desc: Your behavioral profile shows that clearly defined goals significantly improve your sustained performance over time.

pricing.title: Choose Your Analysis Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need deeper insights

disclaimer.title: Legal Disclaimer
disclaimer.content:
This product provides AI-generated behavioral insights for informational and self-reflection purposes only.

It does not provide:
• Medical advice
• Psychological diagnosis
• Financial advice
• Predictive claims
• Guaranteed outcomes

All behavioral profiles and insights are generated through probabilistic modeling and should be considered as reference for personal understanding, not as professional recommendations.

finalCta.title: Ready to Understand Your Behavioral Patterns?
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands who have gained data-driven self-awareness through AI behavioral analysis.
